ddls:
CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (m: male, f: female, c: colt, g: gelding) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse in years */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer assigned to the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the horse */,
  "microchip_number" TEXT /* Microchip number of the horse */,
  "pedigree" TEXT /* Pedigree information of the horse */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the horse */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the horse in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the horse in kilograms */,
  "last_vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vaccination */,
  "current_medication" TEXT /* Current medication or treatment the horse is on */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary requirements or restrictions */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date of retirement, if applicable */,
  "retirement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for retirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trainer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the trainer */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the trainer (e.g., flat racing, steeplechase) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the trainer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the trainer holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or organization (if applicable) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the company or organization */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the owner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the owner's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles or links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_venue" TEXT /* Venue of the race */,
  "race_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in meters */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., flat, steeplechase) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the race */,
  "number_of_horses" INTEGER /* Number of horses participating in the race */,
  "race_results" TEXT /* Results of the race (e.g., 1st: Horse A, 2nd: Horse B, etc.) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track (e.g., good, heavy, soft) */,
  "race_cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for race cancellation, if applicable */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the race */,
  "race_organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the horse was entered into the race */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the horse in the race */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds for the horse in the race */,
  "odds_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the odds were last updated */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey riding the horse */,
  "jockey_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the jockey */,
  "jockey_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the training session (e.g., speed, endurance, agility) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the training session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the training session took place */,
  "session_temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the training session */,
  "session_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the training session */,
  "trainer_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinary_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinary record */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the veterinary visit */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the horse's condition */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided to the horse */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up visit (if applicable) */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended */,
  "treatment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  "veterinarian_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the veterinarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_veterinary_records_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("veterinarian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_veterinary_records_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinarians" (
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "veterinarian_name" TEXT /* Full name of the veterinarian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the veterinarian */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the veterinarian */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the veterinarian */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the veterinarian */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the veterinarian (e.g., equine surgery, internal medicine) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the veterinarian */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the veterinarian holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veterinarian_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, owner, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., speed, endurance, agility) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., meters, seconds) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., training session, race) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the horse in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the horse to complete the race */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the race result */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race for the horse */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race for the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey riding the horse */,
  "jockey_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
